title: Art Wetherell
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Art Wetherell''' was the penciller for the [[Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal|''Jabba the Hutt'']]'' ''and'' ''[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi'']].{{Mediacat|imagecat=images by Art Wetherell}}

{{Artist-stub}}

*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]''
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]]
